column1: # Historical Returns Dataset for FIRE Planner (Synthetic Data)
# Purpose: Realistic synthetic approximation of historical asset class returns for Monte Carlo simulation
# License: Synthetic data for educational/planning purposes only - not actual market data
# - US Equities: Based on S&P 500 patterns (Damodaran NYU Stern methodology)
# - SG Equities (STI): Based on SGX Straits Times Index patterns (1987-2024)
# - Intl Equities: Based on MSCI World ex-US patterns (1970-2024)
# - US Bonds: Based on 10-year Treasury patterns (FRED methodology)
# - REITs: Based on FTSE NAREIT patterns (1972-2024)
# - Gold: Based on LBMA gold price patterns (1968-2024)
# - CPF: Singapore CPF blended OA+SA rate (constant 3%)
# - USD_SGD_Change: USD/SGD exchange rate annual change (MAS patterns
# All return values are decimal fractions (0.10 = 10%)
# Blank cells indicate data not available for that period
